description: The instructional text on the screen updates from 'Great. To start...' to 'Okay, I see your', indicating the system has detected the screen share and is moving to the next step.
frame_description: A dark screen with white instructional text and a small video overlay of the participant in the top right corner.

description: The user is reading the on-screen instructions during the setup phase of the session.
frame_description: The user is looking at the screen while instructions are displayed.
